topic: early growth and spring frost exposure
trigger_keywords: aumentar el riesgo de heladas primaverales

steps.label: cause
steps.text: Unusually warm spring weather or early pruning advances budburst and other vulnerable growth stages.

steps.label: mechanism
steps.text: Tender green tissue emerges while damaging sub-zero nights may still occur later in spring.

steps.label: effect
steps.text: The period of exposure to spring frost increases, raising the risk of damaged shoots, flowers, and crop loss.

steps.label: exam_formulation
steps.text: Formative causal formulation: The period of exposure to spring frost increases, raising the risk of damaged shoots, flowers, and crop loss.

_meta.source_note: Inferred formative model - not official WSET assessment or mark-scheme content
